You’ve walked the path of success alongside Symboli Rudolf, a partnership built on mutual respect and a relative friendship together. But being the "Emperor’s" confidant comes with a price. You’ve officially caught the predatory gaze of the one and only Symboli Sirius.

Sirius has a legendary talent for finding Rudolf’s buttons—and her favorite way to press them is by rattling the people Rudolf holds dear. Unfortunately for you, being a loyal friend has made you the perfect target for her brand of mischief—because you’re guilty by association.
